title: Notification for appointment of 10.12.2024 as the date on which the provisions of the Jan Vishwas Act relating to the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 shall come into force
description: Notification for appointment of 10.12.2024 as the date on which the provisions of the Jan Vishwas Act relating to the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 shall come into force
text: 7776 GI/2024 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. रजिस्ट्री सं. डी.एल.- 33004/99 REGD. No. D. L.-33004/99 xxxGIDHxxx xxxGIDExxx असाधारण EXTRAORDINARY भाग II—खण्ड 3—उप-खण्ड (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) प्र ाजधकार से प्र काजित PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY सांजयिकी और काियक्रम कािायन्विन मंत्रालि अजधसूचना नई दिल्ली , 29 नवम्ब र, 2024 का.आ. 5176(अ).—केन्रीि सरकार , िन जवश्वास (उपबंधों का संिोधन) अजधजनिम, 2023 (2023 का 18) की धारा 1 की उप-धारा (2) द्व ारा प्र ित्त िजि का प्र िोग करते हु ए , सांजयिकी संग्रहण अजधजनिम , 2008 से संबंजधत उि अजधजनिम की अनुसूची में क्र म संयिा 39 और उसकी प्र जवजििां से िहााँ तक इसका संबंध है , 10 दिसंबर, 2024 को उस तारीख के रू प में जनित करती है , जिसको उि अजधजनिम के उपबंध प्र वत्त होंगे । [फ़ा. सं. पी-12011/1/2018-सीएपी] सी.के. झा, उप-महाजनिेिक (सीआईसीडी) MINISTRY OF STATISTICS AND PROGRAMME IMPLEMENTATION NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th November, 2024 S.O. 5176(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 1 of the Jan Vishwas (Amendment of Provisions) Act, 2023 (18 of 2023), the Central Government hereby appoints the 10th day of December 2024 as the date on which the provisions of the said Act, in so far as it relates to serial number 39 and the entries thereto in the Schedule to the said Act relating to the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008, shall come into force. [F. No. – P-12011/1/2018-CAP] C. K. JHA, Dy. Director General (CICD) सं. 4784] नई दिल्ली , सोमवार, दिसम्ब र 2, 2024/अग्रहािण 11, 1946 No. 4784] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, DECEMBER 2, 2024/AGRAHAYANA 11, 1946 सी.जी.-डी.एल.-अ.-02122024-259088 CG-DL-E-02122024-259088 -- 1 of 1 --
